title: Create Frequency
description: This mod adds a frequency system that allows players to remotely transmit redstone signals across the Create Network using waves.
body:
# ![modpack title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88886efd47240187bc85cb2533540bf2cc42a8ef.png) #
**A powerful wireless utility for the Create mod.**
--- ### **Overview** **Create: Frequency** is an addon for [Create](https://github.com/Creators-of-Create/Create) that adds a wireless communication system based on frequencies. It allows for seamless remote interaction and organized network management across your entire world. ### **Requirements** To ensure compatibility, please use the following versions: * **Minecraft:** `1.21.1` * **NeoForge:** `21.1.208` or higher * **Create:** `6.0.6` or higher --- ### **Resources** * 📦 **Source:** [Project Page](https://github.com/ripiters/Create-Frequency-1.21.1) * 🛠️ **Issue Tracker:** [Report a Bug](https://github.com/ripiters/Create-Frequency-1.21.1/issues) * 📜 **License:** MIT ---
📜 License & Credits This mod is an extension designed for the Create Mod. Code & Logic: Developed by ripiters. Full licensing information can be found in the LICENSE.txt file included with the mod file.
#
Built with passion for the Create Mod community.
